creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Dennis Friedrichsen from comment #0)

Bugzilla 259353 is about a type of boot failure where U-Boot
stops before FreeBSD is ever involved. The error message from
man_reserve_resource_bound is from the FreeBSD kernel. So
259353 is not relevant.

Bugzilla 272792 is not about a man_reserve_resource_bound
panic and, so, is not relevant.

While it may be that switching RPi* firmware or U-Boot versions
could side step the man_reserve_resource_bound failure,
the FreeBSD kernel does need to be updated to handle when leads
to man_reserve_resource_bound requesting the panic. This
bugzilla should not be counted as fixed until that has happened.
